_meta.description: Contract for build-media-assets: deterministic visual system derivation, shot planning, prompt generation, and optional image generation.

from_pipeline.cloud_note: allow_media_generation and media_generation_model are optional config fields

optional_inputs.purpose: Additional context for prompt generation (messaging, tone)

media_generation.description: Complete media generation output including visual system, shot taxonomy, prompts, and optionally generated images.

allow_media_generation.description: Set to 'true' to enable image generation API calls. Default: prompts_only mode.

media_generation_model.description: Image generation model to use. Must be available on configured OpenAI credential.

terminal_statuses.PHASE_9_PROMPTS_ONLY: Prompts generated but no image API calls (default mode)

determinism_guarantees.visual_system: Pure function of (brand_positioning, store_profile). Same inputs → same visual system.
determinism_guarantees.shot_taxonomy: Fixed set of shot types. Not input-dependent. Same for every product.
determinism_guarantees.prompts: Pure function of (product, shot_type, visual_system). Same inputs → same prompt string.
determinism_guarantees.shot_plan: Deterministic cross-product of (products × shot_types). Same inputs → same plan.
determinism_guarantees.shopify_mapping: Deterministic mapping of shot_types to Shopify image roles.

cost_controls.generation_mode: Only required shots (priority 1-3) sent for generation
cost_controls.optional_shots: hero_wide, detail_closeup remain prompt_only even in generation mode

cloud_behavior.image_urls: Returned as temporary OpenAI URLs (expire after ~1h)

self_hosted_behavior.image_persistence: Downloaded from URL and saved as PNG
